drowning-in-sky.info.warped_wont_spin: Warped logs resist spinning around their axis. Similarly, warped doors and trapdoors resist spinning around their flat side (ie, a trapdoor laying flat on the ground resists spinning, but not tipping).
drowning-in-sky.info.crimson_wont_tip: Crimson logs resist tipping over. Similarly, crimson doors and trapdoors resist turning from the plane they sit in. They don't resist spinning around their axis.
drowning-in-sky.info.mace_core_resists_s: Heavy cores resist any form of spin.
drowning-in-sky.info.blinklamp_mass:
Analog redstone signals make blinklamps heavier. When unpowered, it weighs 0.25 kpg. Each level of signal strength doubles its mass, up to 8192 kpg.
(The tooltip is wrong.)
